data.name: 赤髮鬼神
data.detailed_description:
As the skies tear asunder, dimensional rifts appear throughout the land. They flood the world with powerful miasma, turn wildlife into demonic aberrations, and threaten mankind. Only the fabled Demon Annihilators, righteous warriors chosen by the gods, can harness enough power to fend off hordes of demons and obliterate the core of the rifts to cleanse the land.

Agnis Flarebyte, the most powerful of a long line of Annihilators, loses her power at the hands of a greedy, corrupt Prime Minister of the kingdom. He vows to keep her magic energy hostage until she meets his demands, thus endangering the integrity of the nation as the looming threat of the rifts continues to grow. Agnis must find a way to regain her lost power with the help of her assistant's magic-gathering strategies, then finally end the rift's menace and the Prime Minister's ploy.
data.about_the_game:
As the skies tear asunder, dimensional rifts appear throughout the land. They flood the world with powerful miasma, turn wildlife into demonic aberrations, and threaten mankind. Only the fabled Demon Annihilators, righteous warriors chosen by the gods, can harness enough power to fend off hordes of demons and obliterate the core of the rifts to cleanse the land.

Agnis Flarebyte, the most powerful of a long line of Annihilators, loses her power at the hands of a greedy, corrupt Prime Minister of the kingdom. He vows to keep her magic energy hostage until she meets his demands, thus endangering the integrity of the nation as the looming threat of the rifts continues to grow. Agnis must find a way to regain her lost power with the help of her assistant's magic-gathering strategies, then finally end the rift's menace and the Prime Minister's ploy.
data.short_description: Agnis, the Scarlet Demonslayer, is the strongest of the demon eradication warriors battling against the calamities that plague the world. But after losing her powers, the nation is defenseless against the otherworldly attacks! To recover her lost magic, she must depend on her assistants to help her!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Nuko Majin, All Rights Reserved.
